title: Guard
visual_description: A towering pale or grey skinless-looking humanoid jailer with an exposed muscular body, butcher apron or loincloth, a heavy meat cleaver in one hand, and a prominent stinger between the legs.
text: Guard visual profile: towering pale muscular prison jailer, exposed flesh, butcher cleaver, loincloth or apron, and stinger.

title: Guard (Ballista)
visual_description: A massive pale prison guard variant positioned with or carrying a large mechanical ballista-like ranged weapon.
text: Ballista Guard visual profile: huge pale guard associated with a conspicuous mechanical ballista.

title: Elite Guard
visual_description: A larger and more imposing guard variant with a weapon arm, heavier presence, and a visible poisonous tail or stinger.
text: Elite Guard visual profile: imposing upgraded guard with a weapon and poisonous tail stinger.

title: Infected Guard
visual_description: A prison guard whose pale flesh is visibly corrupted by growths, infection, or plant-like pollution rather than an ordinary clean guard body.
text: Infected Guard visual profile: recognizable guard body altered by diseased or plant-like growths.

title: Maneba
visual_description: A low crawling fleshy parasite-like monster with an irregular swollen body, close to the ground and lacking a normal humanoid stance.
text: Maneba visual profile: low-to-the-ground fleshy crawling parasite creature.

title: Cave Gnome
visual_description: A very small hunched cave-dwelling humanoid creature, much shorter than the party and guards.
text: Cave Gnome visual profile: tiny hunched humanoid cave creature.

title: Crow Mauler
visual_description: A tall humanoid executioner with a large black crow head and beak, looming posture, and a heavy mauling weapon.
text: Crow Mauler visual profile: towering crow-headed humanoid stalker carrying a brutal heavy weapon.

title: Trortur
visual_description: A human torturer associated with the prison torture chambers, carrying tools or weapons suited to mutilation rather than a monstrous guard body.
text: Trortur visual profile: human dungeon torturer found around prison torture rooms.
